summary: Static code review of Iter 19.9.16 (a11y aria-labels + data-testid naming alignment for Vault/Cards/IDs inline-search). No app start / Playwright per agent_to_agent_context_note (Upstash creds blocker). All 5 required verifications PASS.

verifications.1_aria_label_cards_input: PASS - CardsDashboard.tsx line 266 has aria-label={t('cards.search_aria')} between placeholder (265) and value (267) on the inline-search input (data-testid='cards-inline-search').
verifications.2_aria_label_ids_input: PASS - IdsDashboard.tsx line 297 has aria-label={t('ids.search_aria')} between placeholder (296) and value (298) on the inline-search input (data-testid='ids-inline-search').
verifications.3_testid_naming_consistency: PASS - All 3 clear-buttons follow {scope}-inline-search-clear-btn pattern: VaultDashboard.tsx:300='vault-inline-search-clear-btn', CardsDashboard.tsx:275='cards-inline-search-clear-btn', IdsDashboard.tsx:306='ids-inline-search-clear-btn'. No legacy testids ('vault-search-clear-btn', 'cards-inline-search-clear', 'ids-inline-search-clear') remain in the codebase (grep returned 0 matches).
verifications.4_i18n_sync_all_4_languages: PASS - cards.search_aria and ids.search_aria present in no/sv/da/en. Values verified: no='Søk i kort'/'Søk i ID-er', sv='Sök i kort'/'Sök i ID:n', da='Søg i kort'/'Søg i ID'er' (file uses curly apostrophe ’), en='Search cards'/'Search IDs'. All match spec (minor da apostrophe-style variation cosmetic only).
verifications.5_meta_key_count: PASS - All 4 locales have _meta.key_count_at_last_sync=1067. Actual measured counts: total=1068 (incl. _meta), non-_meta=1067 → matches declared count exactly. 0 missing, 0 extra across locales.
verifications.6_vault_aria_untouched: PASS - VaultDashboard.tsx line 296 still uses aria-label={t('vault.search_aria')} (existing key, not reused for cards/ids — domain separation preserved as documented).
verifications.7_no_test_files_reference_old_ids: PASS - No frontend test files (tests/, __tests__/, e2e/) found referencing search-clear testids. No regression risk from rename.

critical_code_review_comments: All three inline-search-input elements now have a consistent a11y triad (placeholder + aria-label + data-testid). Good consistency.
Clear-button testids are now uniformly suffixed -btn matching the broader codebase convention (e.g., vault-add-btn, ids-add-btn, cards-view-list-btn). Naming convention is now self-documenting.

Minor (non-blocking): The clear-button aria-label on Cards (line 278) and IDs (line 309) reuses t('vault.search_clear_aria') rather than scope-specific keys (cards.search_clear_aria / ids.search_clear_aria). This is contrary to the 'domain separation' principle applied to search_aria. Consider extracting per-scope clear-aria keys for full consistency in a future micro-iter — not blocking now.

Minor (non-blocking): CardsDashboard.tsx still contains a hardcoded Norwegian string 'Ny' (line 181) and 'Henter kort fra server...' (line 293); IdsDashboard has 'Ny' (line 215) and 'Henter ID-er fra server...' (line 324). Also CARD_TYPE_LABELS (lines 41-46) and ID_KIND_META (lines 47-53) hold untranslated Norwegian labels. Pre-existing — not part of this iter's scope but worth flagging.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 19.9.16 (a11y + naming-cleanup) static-verified PASS. Cannot run UI in this pod (Upstash creds missing — blocker since iter_3). Two non-blocking observations carried forward: (a) clear-button aria-label reuses vault.search_clear_aria across all 3 scopes (domain-separation inconsistency vs. search_aria which IS per-scope), (b) hardcoded Norwegian strings still exist in CardsDashboard/IdsDashboard (CARD_TYPE_LABELS, ID_KIND_META, 'Ny', loader text) — pre-existing, not addressed in 19.9.16. Build 25.28s / lint 1.63s green per main agent.
rca of the issue: n/a — verification iteration, no bugs found
